summary: Backend regression + refactor validation after (1) JWT_SECRET moved to /app/backend/.env with no hardcoded fallback, (2) 3 reports endpoints (by-department, completion-rates, kpis) refactored from N+1 count_documents loops to single MongoDB $group/$cond aggregation pipelines, (3) KPI approved-activities query bounded with .to_list(5000). Result: 55/55 pytest tests PASS (49 original + 6 new refactor-specific). No regressions detected. Admin login (admin/admin123) works; forged token signed with a different secret is correctly rejected with 401 confirming JWT_SECRET is sourced from env. Reports endpoints preserve exact response shapes; by-department correctly includes empty departments (total=0 rows are present, not missing); invariants total = approved + rejected + pending and approval_rate = round(approved/total*100, 1) hold across all rows. completion_rates sorted DESC by completion_rate; kpis sorted DESC by kpi_score with rating ∈ {ممتاز, جيد جداً, جيد, يحتاج تحسين}.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:24 - JWT_SECRET = os.environ['JWT_SECRET'] (no default). Will fail fast if env var missing — correct pattern.

server.py:565-598 (by-department) - Single aggregation with $group + $cond replaces prior N*4 count_documents. Empty departments are still included by iterating over departments list and defaulting stats.get(d['id'], {total:0,approved:0,rejected:0}). Shape unchanged.
server.py:600-641 (completion-rates) - Same $group aggregation pattern; iterates employees list to include zero-activity employees; sorted desc by completion_rate. Shape unchanged.

server.py:643-708 (kpis) - $group aggregation for counts; approved_docs bounded with .to_list(5000) [server.py:671]; turnaround calc unchanged. Shape unchanged (kpi_score, rating, avg_turnaround_days present).
backend/.env now contains JWT_SECRET='gcaan-prod-secret-a7f9c3e8d6b4h2j1k5m9n0p2q4r6s8t0' (32 chars) — production-grade length. No hardcoded fallback in server.py.
Note: 5000 doc cap on approved KPI query could silently truncate KPI turnaround stats at scale. Non-blocking for MVP but flag if user expects >5k approved activities per query scope.
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates a TEST_empty_<uuid> department (never deleted) plus test users/divisions/activities inherited from test_gcaan_backend.py. All prefixed with TEST_. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 refactored reports endpoints validated for shape parity + empty-department correctness. JWT_SECRET env sourcing verified via forged-token 401 test. If backend .env is ever reset, JWT_SECRET must be re-added or server will crash on boot (intentional). Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_gcaan_backend.py (49 tests) and /app/backend/tests/test_reports_refactor.py (6 tests) — run both via `pytest /app/backend/tests/` with EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL set.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no regressions found. Refactor is safe.
